hypothesis: Specific player style x course type combinations produce systematic placement market mispricing not captured by DG skill probabilities alone. Edges measured as relative_book_residual above market-wide baseline.
pre_registered_interactions: H1: STYLE_01 x COURSE_A → OVER top_20 (bomber in scoring feast)
H2: STYLE_04 x COURSE_D → OVER top_20 (grinder in hard grind)
H3: STYLE_03 x COURSE_B → OVER top_20 (balanced on easy precision)
H4: STYLE_01 x COURSE_D → NULL or UNDER top_20 (style mismatch)
H5: STYLE_04 x COURSE_A → NULL top_20 (grinder in birdie fest)
